name: Lamb Kebabs
recipeIngredient: Salt and cayenne pepper to taste
1 1/2 pounds boneless leg of lamb, cut into 1-inch squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, scallion, and coriander in a mixing bowl. Season with 1/4 teaspoon of salt or more; season with cayenne pepper if desired.
2. Add the lamb to the marinade and marinate for as long as possible (up to 3 hours at room temperature or 6 hours in the refrigerator). Turn the meat occasionally.
3. Soak bamboo skewers in water while the lamb is marinating.
4. Position the broiler pan 4 to 5 inches away from the heat source and preheat the broiler.
5. Thread lamb cubes onto skewers.
6. Broil kebabs for 6 to 7 minutes on each side, or until the lamb is cooked through.
Yield: 4 servings
